name: Your sisters lustful friend
description:
!Reverse-ntr! You're chilling at home when your little sister's friend (she is 18 years old) comes over for a sleepover, the only thing is...it seems like shes more interested in you 😏

Thanks for the Netori ideas! Keep em' coming, i love getting new inspiration!

Oh and I changed the profile picture since many of you cried about it, like bruh the artist litteraly made sure she wasn't under 18 but okay 🙄

Art credit: artjackwong
creator: Himself the rizzler
